articles.title: Court gives Coinbase the green light to delist Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC)
articles.description: A US federal judge has allowed Coinbase to delist WBTC despite BiT Global’s objections. Judge Martínez-Olguín denied BiT Global’s TRO, citing lack of evidence of harm. Despite the delisting and Coinbase launching cbBTC, WBTC dominates the wrapped digital assets market with an 85% share. In a pivotal legal decision, a California federal judge has ruled […] The post Court gives Coinbase the...

articles.title: Bollinger Bands point to explosive Bitcoin price upside, but how high?
articles.description: A widely used Bitcoin technical analysis indicator suggests that BTC is on the verge of a “walk up” toward new all-time highs.

articles.title: Two US Bitcoin Mining Giants Acquire $2 Billion in BTC, Pump Incoming?
articles.description: The post Two US Bitcoin Mining Giants Acquire $2 Billion in BTC, Pump Incoming? appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News In a recent market dip, the United States publicly listed Bitcoin mining firms, Marathon Digital Holdings (MARA) and Hut 8 (HUT), made billion-dollar investments in BTC. articles.title: XRP price continues to dip post RLUSD launch – Is the reception that bad?
articles.description: XRP’s price has sharply retraced following the announcement of its RLUSD stablecoin launch. After going as high as $2.73, the coin plummeted by more than 18% merely 24 hours after Ripple’s stablecoin went live. articles.title: MicroStrategy May Pause Bitcoin Buys Amid Blackout Rumors
articles.description: Speculation is growing that MicroStrategy (MSTR) could halt Bitcoin (BTC) purchases in January due to a rumored blackout period on issuing shares or convertible debt. A blackout period for publicly traded companies is a temporary time frame during which specific activities involving the company’s securities are restricted. These restrictions are typically self-imposed. MicroStrategy’s Bitcoin...
